markets.title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates before 2027?

markets.rules_primary: If real GDP (as measured by the BEA’s seasonally adjusted and annualized Advance Estimate) increases by more than 4.5, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market will close at 8:29 AM on the day of the expected release of the data. The market will expire at the first 10:00 AM following the release of the data for Q1 2026, or 3 months following that expected date of data release. Please note the Expiration Value is the one-decimal value published by the BEA.
